---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the reproduction, eval harness, site, or docs
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Reminder: Imagined Cosmos contributes no new theory and no new measurement — it
reproduces established, peer-reviewed RVM physics in self-contained TypeScript.
The most valued proposals sharpen agreement with the published literature, add
citations, improve the numerical cross-checks, or make the reproduction clearer.
Proposals that introduce novel/unpublished physics claims are out of scope.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What gap or rough edge are you hitting? Why does it matter for a reproduction?

## Proposed change

A clear, concise description of what you'd like to see.

## Type of improvement

- [ ] Tighter agreement with / additional citation to the published literature
- [ ] New or improved numerical cross-check in the eval harness
- [ ] Physics engine clarity or correctness (`src/lib/physics/`)
- [ ] Site / UX improvement
- [ ] Docs / whitepaper clarity
- [ ] Tooling / CI / DX
- [ ] Other

## Faithfulness to the literature

If this touches the physics, link the paper(s) or equation(s) it should match,
and note any tolerance or summary statistic involved.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
